title: Integration of Software Quality in Project Planning Lifecycle
description: A flowchart illustrating how quality considerations are embedded into each phase of the software project planning process, demonstrating that quality is not a separate activity but an integral part of planning.
relationships: Quality objectives defined in initiation feed into requirements
Quality requirements (non-functional) are specified in analysis
Architectural and design decisions are made to meet quality attributes in design
Development standards and practices are planned to ensure code quality
Test strategies and plans are created to validate quality
Deployment plans include quality gates and checks
Maintenance plans include procedures for quality monitoring and improvement
